title: Workshop: Build a Public-Alert Audio Controller
summary: Workshop: Build a Public-Alert Audio Controller retrieves prior skills in an original keyboard-operated multilingual emergency audio advisory scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply keyboard focus, accessible names descriptions, aria use, accessible media equivalents in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real keyboard-operated multilingual emergency audio advisory artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
